title: Bead preparation protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f2sma","text":"STRIP is a start-to-end streamlined and automated procedure for COVID-19 testing, centering on a single Tecan Fluent liquid-handling robot that can process over 14,000 samples per day. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"35j5l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ukj1","text":"Here we describe the protocol to prepare the magnetic beads that are currently used in STRIP. Note, in this protocol we use Sera-Mag SpeedBead Carboxylate-Modified Magnetic Particles (Hydrophobic) from Cytivia, but other beads such as    SeraSil Mag 400 beads (Cytiva) can be used as substitutes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"87ktt","text":"Sera-Mag SpeedBead Carboxylate-Modified Magnetic Particles (Hydrophobic). Cytivia, #65152105050350.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aqe1q","text":"DynaMag™-50 Magnet.Thermo Fisher, #12302D.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5llk9","text":"2-Propanol HPLC grade. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mix the beads by vortexing for 00:01:00 .
Put the beads on a rollerbank for 00:30:00 .
Put the 50 ml tube on the magnet.
When the solution is clear carefully remove the supernatant.
Resuspend beads in 10 ml 2-Propanol. Beads resuspended in 2-Propanol can be stored at 4°C for at least 5 days.
When ready to be used mix by vortexing and transfer the 10 ml beads to 150 ml 2-Propanol.
Add 20 ml 2-Propanol to the 50 ml tube to resuspend the remaining beads and transfer the diluted beads.
Transfer the diluted beads (Total volume 200 ml) into the spinvessel. Start the spinvessel, this will keep the beads in solution. Beads can be used for 5 days at RT.
authors: Lieven B J van der Velden
Jeroen H B van de Bovenkamp
creator: Peter Krijger
